title: Count Number of Homogenous Substrings
titleCn: 统计同质子字符串的数目

testcases.input: s = "abbcccaa" Output: 13 Explanation: The homogenous substrings are listed as below: "a" appears 3 times. "aa" appears 1 time. "b" appears 2 times. "bb" appears 1 time. "c" appears 3 times. "cc" appears 2 times. "ccc" appears 1 time. 3 + 1 + 2 + 1 + 3 + 2 + 1 = 13.
testcases.expectedOutput: 13 Explanation: The homogenous substrings are listed as below: "a" appears 3 times. "aa" appears 1 time. "b" appears 2 times. "bb" appears 1 time. "c" appears 3 times. "cc" appears 2 times. "ccc" appears 1 time. 3 + 1 + 2 + 1 + 3 + 2 + 1 = 13.

testcases.input: s = "xy" Output: 2 Explanation: The homogenous substrings are "x" and "y".
